markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff meeting to align GrowthX and Panther on content strategy and execution.](https://fathom.video/share/hKuYPjRdBT8q6Ewpnc7yVWVs-rdvMGzA?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategic Shift:** Panther is pivoting from a reactive content model to a proactive, technical strategy to drive enterprise pipeline. This is now viable because key product gaps that caused deal losses are closed, and a new AI co-pilot (shipping in March) will expand the ICP to include SOC analysts.](https://fathom.video/share/hKuYPjRdBT8q6Ewpnc7yVWVs-rdvMGzA?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [**Primary Goal:** Increase qualified traffic and enterprise leads by shifting focus from small commercial deals to high-value, six-figure enterprise "rip and replace" opportunities, primarily targeting Splunk.](https://fathom.video/share/hKuYPjRdBT8q6Ewpnc7yVWVs-rdvMGzA?tab=summary&timestamp=1794.0)
  - [**Key Challenge:** Overcome the perception that Panther is "too complex" for non-Python users and not a strategic vendor for CISOs. The March AI release is the key enabler for this shift.](https://fathom.video/share/hKuYPjRdBT8q6Ewpnc7yVWVs-rdvMGzA?tab=summary&timestamp=1571.0)
  - [**Execution Plan:** GrowthX will become the content production engine, leveraging Panther's new Threat Research team for technical input and Jack's Substack for voice/tone guidance. The first two weeks are dedicated to deep dives and calibration to ensure technical accuracy and brand alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/hKuYPjRdBT8q6Ewpnc7yVWVs-rdvMGzA?tab=summary&timestamp=952.0)

## Topics

### The "Why Now" & Strategic Pivot

  - [**Problem:** Panther's lean marketing team is reactive, and inbound leads (80–90%) are small commercial deals. The business needs more enterprise pipeline to hit revenue targets.](https://fathom.video/share/hKuYPjRdBT8q6Ewpnc7yVWVs-rdvMGzA?tab=summary&timestamp=1794.0)
  - [**Solution:** A proactive, technical content strategy is required to build brand awareness and credibility with a skeptical, technical audience.](https://fathom.video/share/hKuYPjRdBT8q6Ewpnc7yVWVs-rdvMGzA?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
  - [**Enabling Factors:**](https://fathom.video/share/hKuYPjRdBT8q6Ewpnc7yVWVs-rdvMGzA?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
      - [**Closed Product Gaps:** Key features are now complete, making the product enterprise-ready and reducing deal losses.](https://fathom.video/share/hKuYPjRdBT8q6Ewpnc7yVWVs-rdvMGzA?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)
      - [**New AI Co-pilot (March):** This release will make Panther accessible to SOC analysts, expanding the ICP beyond Python-proficient security engineers.](https://fathom.video/share/hKuYPjRdBT8q6Ewpnc7yVWVs-rdvMGzA?tab=summary&timestamp=1268.0)
      - [**Threat Research Team:** A new team is producing technical content (\~1 post/week), providing a consistent source of raw material. GrowthX will optimize this for search performance.](https://fathom.video/share/hKuYPjRdBT8q6Ewpnc7yVWVs-rdvMGzA?tab=summary&timestamp=805.0)

### Ideal Customer Profile (ICP) & Target Market

  - [**Commercial Segment ("My First SIEM"):**](https://fathom.video/share/hKuYPjRdBT8q6Ewpnc7yVWVs-rdvMGzA?tab=summary&timestamp=1755.0)
      - [**Trigger:** Scaling companies needing a SIEM for compliance (e.g., SOC 2) or customer security requirements.](https://fathom.video/share/hKuYPjRdBT8q6Ewpnc7yVWVs-rdvMGzA?tab=summary&timestamp=1954.0)
      - [**Deal Cycle:** Fast (2–4 weeks).](https://fathom.video/share/hKuYPjRdBT8q6Ewpnc7yVWVs-rdvMGzA?tab=summary&timestamp=1755.0)
  - [**Enterprise Segment ("Rip & Replace"):**](https://fathom.video/share/hKuYPjRdBT8q6Ewpnc7yVWVs-rdvMGzA?tab=summary&timestamp=1794.0)
      - [**Trigger:** A major incident or a new CISO's frustration with a legacy SIEM's high cost, poor performance, or lack of flexibility.](https://fathom.video/share/hKuYPjRdBT8q6Ewpnc7yVWVs-rdvMGzA?tab=summary&timestamp=1926.0)
      - [**Target:** High-value, six-figure deals, primarily targeting Splunk rips.](https://fathom.video/share/hKuYPjRdBT8q6Ewpnc7yVWVs-rdvMGzA?tab=summary&timestamp=1794.0)
      - [**Ideal Profile:** Cloud-native companies or those with \>80% cloud infrastructure.](https://fathom.video/share/hKuYPjRdBT8q6Ewpnc7yVWVs-rdvMGzA?tab=summary&timestamp=1888.0)
  - [**Buyer Personas:**](https://fathom.video/share/hKuYPjRdBT8q6Ewpnc7yVWVs-rdvMGzA?tab=summary&timestamp=2487.0)
      - [**Security Engineers:** Hands-on users who are easily "wowed" by the product's capabilities.](https://fathom.video/share/hKuYPjRdBT8q6Ewpnc7yVWVs-rdvMGzA?tab=summary&timestamp=2487.0)
      - [**CISOs:** The primary decision-makers. They are more likely to buy if they have a technical background and understand the engineering-driven value proposition.](https://fathom.video/share/hKuYPjRdBT8q6Ewpnc7yVWVs-rdvMGzA?tab=summary&timestamp=2487.0)

### Competitive Landscape

  - [**Primary Target:** Legacy SIEMs (Splunk, Exabeam, Devo, Elastic). Panther is highly competitive in displacing these.](https://fathom.video/share/hKuYPjRdBT8q6Ewpnc7yVWVs-rdvMGzA?tab=summary&timestamp=2067.0)
  - [**Challenger Target:** Cloud platforms (CrowdStrike, Datadog, Palo Alto). These are harder to displace due to low/free initial pricing, but Panther can win teams frustrated by their SIEM's lack of flexibility.](https://fathom.video/share/hKuYPjRdBT8q6Ewpnc7yVWVs-rdvMGzA?tab=summary&timestamp=2008.0)
  - [**Key Objections:**](https://fathom.video/share/hKuYPjRdBT8q6Ewpnc7yVWVs-rdvMGzA?tab=summary&timestamp=2314.0)
      - [**Change Management:** The perceived effort of ripping out a legacy SIEM.](https://fathom.video/share/hKuYPjRdBT8q6Ewpnc7yVWVs-rdvMGzA?tab=summary&timestamp=2314.0)
      - [**Complexity:** The need for Python skills and the lack of a non-technical analyst experience (addressed by the March AI release).](https://fathom.video/share/hKuYPjRdBT8q6Ewpnc7yVWVs-rdvMGzA?tab=summary&timestamp=1571.0)
      - [**Cloud Focus:** A perception of being AWS-native, which can be a barrier for GCP-heavy customers.](https://fathom.video/share/hKuYPjRdBT8q6Ewpnc7yVWVs-rdvMGzA?tab=summary&timestamp=2421.0)

### Content Strategy & Execution

  - [**Current State:** Content is reactive and event-driven (e.g., product releases). The bottleneck is content production, not reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/hKuYPjRdBT8q6Ewpnc7yVWVs-rdvMGzA?tab=summary&timestamp=3015.0)
  - [**Voice & Tone:**](https://fathom.video/share/hKuYPjRdBT8q6Ewpnc7yVWVs-rdvMGzA?tab=summary&timestamp=2921.0)
      - [**Guidance:** "Help me do my job" and "fight your attackers, not your tools."](https://fathom.video/share/hKuYPjRdBT8q6Ewpnc7yVWVs-rdvMGzA?tab=summary&timestamp=2970.0)
      - [**Style:** Technical, helpful, and relevant, avoiding pop culture or memes (inspired by Wiz).](https://fathom.video/share/hKuYPjRdBT8q6Ewpnc7yVWVs-rdvMGzA?tab=summary&timestamp=2970.0)
  - [**Key Assets for GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/hKuYPjRdBT8q6Ewpnc7yVWVs-rdvMGzA?tab=summary&timestamp=2814.0)
      - [**Jack's Substack:** Provides a strong model for the desired technical voice.](https://fathom.video/share/hKuYPjRdBT8q6Ewpnc7yVWVs-rdvMGzA?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)
      - [**Top 10 Blog Post Report:** Ana will provide this to identify existing high-performing topics.](https://fathom.video/share/hKuYPjRdBT8q6Ewpnc7yVWVs-rdvMGzA?tab=summary&timestamp=2814.0)
      - [**Jack's Podcast:** A source of raw material for written content.](https://fathom.video/share/hKuYPjRdBT8q6Ewpnc7yVWVs-rdvMGzA?tab=summary&timestamp=2902.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/hKuYPjRdBT8q6Ewpnc7yVWVs-rdvMGzA?tab=summary&timestamp=3278.0)
      - [Schedule deep-dive calls with Jack (CTO), Michael (VP Threat Research), and Katie (PMM) to understand the product, technical vision, and Panther's contrarian view.](https://fathom.video/share/hKuYPjRdBT8q6Ewpnc7yVWVs-rdvMGzA?tab=summary&timestamp=3278.0)
      - [Analyze Jack's Substack and the top 10 blog report to develop initial writing guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/hKuYPjRdBT8q6Ewpnc7yVWVs-rdvMGzA?tab=summary&timestamp=2814.0)
      - [Send a follow-up summary of insights and opportunities for Panther's review.](https://fathom.video/share/hKuYPjRdBT8q6Ewpnc7yVWVs-rdvMGzA?tab=summary&timestamp=3311.0)
      - [Deliver a formal content strategy and roadmap by the end of Week 2.](https://fathom.video/share/hKuYPjRdBT8q6Ewpnc7yVWVs-rdvMGzA?tab=summary&timestamp=3341.0)
  - [**Panther:**](https://fathom.video/share/hKuYPjRdBT8q6Ewpnc7yVWVs-rdvMGzA?tab=summary&timestamp=3473.0)
      - [Provide access to Jack's Substack and the top 10 blog post report.](https://fathom.video/share/hKuYPjRdBT8q6Ewpnc7yVWVs-rdvMGzA?tab=summary&timestamp=2814.0)
      - [Connect GrowthX with Jack, Michael, and Katie for the deep-dive calls.](https://fathom.video/share/hKuYPjRdBT8q6Ewpnc7yVWVs-rdvMGzA?tab=summary&timestamp=3473.0)
